summary: Block Management CRUD testing completed successfully. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified block creation, editing, reordering, and deletion. Public profile renders blocks correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/blocks - Create LINK block with title, url, isVisible
POST /api/blocks - Create RETREAT block with title, dateRange, location
POST /api/blocks - Create TESTIMONIAL block with authorName, quote
GET /api/blocks - Returns all blocks sorted by order
GET /api/blocks/[id] - Returns single block by ID
PUT /api/blocks/[id] - Updates block title, url, isVisible
DELETE /api/blocks/[id] - Deletes block and verifies 404 on re-fetch
POST /api/blocks/reorder - Reorders blocks and persists order correctly
GET /api/profile/[handle] - Returns visible blocks sorted by order
Authentication required for all block CRUD endpoints (401 without session)
Invalid block ID returns 400
Nonexistent block returns 404
Invalid block type returns 400
Missing type field returns 400
UI - Add Block modal shows all block types: LINK, RETREAT, TESTIMONIAL, BOOK_CALL, WHATSAPP, TELEGRAM
UI - Edit Block modal opens with correct fields for each type
UI - Up/Down arrows reorder blocks in dashboard
UI - Blocks render correctly on public profile page
UI - Theme preview and selection working
UI - Profile settings (name, location, headline, bio) editable
seed_data_creation: Test user 'blocktester' exists with RETREAT and TESTIMONIAL blocks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Block CRUD APIs fully migrated to MongoDB and working. Test user 'blocktester' available. All block types supported: LINK, RETREAT, TESTIMONIAL, BOOK_CALL, WHATSAPP, TELEGRAM. Reorder API uses bulkWrite for efficiency. Public profile only shows isVisible=true blocks sorted by order field. Dashboard profile editor has up/down arrow buttons for reordering (not drag-drop).
